confirmed_improvements: Non-bypassable enforcement exists on primary write path
Evidence exchange protocol implemented and partially validated
Trust store currently aligned across lanes
remaining_blockers: Lease enforcement not universal (watcher rename paths at lines 513-516, 554-556)
guardWrite not mandatory on all write paths (create-signed-message.js line 117, urgent P0 writes)
Evidence integrity bypass via schema version (InboxMessageSchema.js lines 171-174) and missing payload (lines 185-193)
Trust store not structurally invariant (independent writes per lane)
details.section_a_summary: Lease: 2 paths. GuardWrite: 2 bypasses. Evidence-hash: 2 gaps. Trust-store: 1 gap.
details.section_b_summary: All items are inactive utility code or already covered by existing enforcement.
